rpo.deepOriginsOverlays.dirtPathAndFarml: Allows blocks to overlay on dirt paths and farmland. §o(Default : §2True§r§o)
rpo.deepOriginsOverlays.allowBlockOverla: Allows blocks to overlay on themselves §l§c(Requires Sodium).
rpo.deepOriginsOverlays.connectedSandsto: Allows sandstone and red sandstone to connect to other blocks. §o(Default : §4False§r§o)
rpo.deepOriginsOverlays.mossAndSnowOverh: Moss carpet and snow layer overhangs.
